title: No Flicker Scaffolding
description: Removes visual flickering across user screens while climbing scaffolding for a sensory-friendly experience
body:
![First person view of a minecraft player climbing scaffolding looking forward and up with a clear view of the sky and no scaffolding texture in the way because they have No Flicker Scaffolding resource pack equipped.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a654cd8dabf74a8287f2a6ed03369d13f7acd0.png)

Removes flickering and visual clutter from scaffolding blocks.

Recently updated for **1.21.7**


No Flicker Scaffolding is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that simplifies scaffolding textures by removing the annoying inner bars seen when climbing. Built intended for players with sensory sensitivity, neurodivergence, or those who just want a cleaner building experience with better scaffolding.


1. Cleaner scaffolding visuals
2. No changes to gameplay or function
3. Designed for improved accessibility and sensory comfort.


Ideal for vanilla builders, minimal packs, Vanilla Tweaks users, and players **sensitive to flashing** or motion-heavy textures.


🧱 Supports all Minecraft versions.
📦 Works great with OptiFine, Fabric, and performance-friendly modpacks.
